title: Sculpting a Galaxy: Inside the Star Wars Model Shop
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:SAG.jpg]] |title=''Sculpting a Galaxy:
Inside the Star Wars Model Shop'' |author=[[Lorne Peterson]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=*[[Insight Editions]] *[[Palace Press]] |release date=[[November 14]], [[2006]]{{Amazon|url=Sculpting-Galaxy-Inside-Star-Model/dp/1933784032|text=Sculpting a Galaxy: Inside the Star Wars Model Shop}} |type=Hardcover, Limited Edition |pages=224 |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=1933784032, 1933784105 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Sculpting a Galaxy: Inside the Star Wars Model Shop''''' is a [[2006]] reference book that examines selected models used in the six ''[[Star Wars]]'' films. It is available both as a standard hardcover and as a Limited Edition. The standard book contains over 300 images and several multi-page gatefolds. ==Contents== ===Contents Regular Edition=== *Preface by [[George Lucas]] *Foreword by [[Rick McCallum]] *Main contents **Chapter I: Starships **Chapter II: Vehicles **Chapter III: Creatures, Droids & Sculpts **Chapter IV: Environments *Snapshots Across the Galaxy (small pictures of people mentioned in the book) *Glossary *Visual Index *Afterword by [[Phil Tippett]] ===Limited Edition=== In addition to the regular book, the Limited Edition includes the following: *4 perforated postcard sheets *5 additional gatefolds, plus "The Family Tree" gatefold *7 hand-painted reproductions of the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] surface panels molded by Lorne Peterson *8-page booklet with guide to Limited Edition model pieces *12-page booklet of classic models describing "white" model process *16-page booklet with historical details about the model shop *32-page ''[[From Putty to Pixels]]'' book *Accordion foldouts of ship cutouts *Certificate of Authenticity *Clamshell box featuring recreation of the ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]''{{'s}} rear quarter [[File:Sculpting_a_Galaxy.jpg|thumb|right|150px|''Limited Edition'' contents]] *Cubbyholes inside for storing three-dimensional models included with book *[[Sculpting a Galaxy: The Limited Edition Models|DVD]] of ''Star Wars'' documentaries and behind-the-scenes imagery by [[Van Ling]] *Recreated "lost" version of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]], including removable figures of Luke, [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], along with a reflective stand for floating effect ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Sculpting a Galaxy: Inside the Star Wars Model Shop}} ===Cover gallery=== File:SAG.jpg|Cover File:SculptingAGalaxy.jpg|''Limited Edition'' cover ==Sources== *{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/ref/news20061017.html|text=''Sculpting a Galaxy'': Inside the Limited Edition}} *{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/ref/f20061113/index.html|text=Loaded with Extras: ''Sculpting a Galaxy'' Limited Edition}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Insight|url=product_info.php?products_id=97&osCsid=d118ce50d4cedda05df6374800161461|text=Sculpting a Galaxy: Inside ''Star Wars''… ''Limited Edition''|archivedate=20080919061239|nolive=1}} {{Interlang |fr=Naissance d'une galaxie : Dans les coulisses de l'atelier des maquettes de Star Wars }} [[Category:Real-world reference books]]
